channel.title: Headlines - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

item.title: Years ago, novelist Tayari Jones snuck into a writing class. It changed her life - NPR
item.description:
1. Years ago, novelist Tayari Jones snuck into a writing class. It changed her life  NPR
  2. Oprah’s Latest Pick Is a Lush, Beautiful Novel About Found Family  The New York Times
  3. Tayari Jones Still Needs To Read Anna Karenina  Literary Hub
  4. Kin  Oprah.com
  5. Tayari Jones’s Respectability Politics  Vulture

item.title: Trump to announce data center energy deals during State of the Union - Politico
item.description:
1. Trump to announce data center energy deals during State of the Union  Politico
  2. Trump announces deal for data centers as Florida moves to rein them in  Miami Herald
  3. Why the tab for powering data centers will keep rising — despite Trump's pledge  Politico
  4. Trump's plan for rising energy costs: Pump oil, make data centers pay - Los Angeles Times  Los Angeles Times
  5. Trump to announce electricity ‘rate payer protection pledges’ from Big Tech  The Hill

item.title: Sundance confirms 2027 Boulder debut details - Axios
item.description:
1. Sundance confirms 2027 Boulder debut details  Axios
  2. Sundance Film Festival reveals Boulder venues, dates for 2027 debut  The Denver Post
  3. Here are the dates and theaters for Boulder’s first Sundance Film Festival  The Colorado Sun
  4. 2027 Sundance Film Festival To Take Place January 21–31 in Boulder, Colorado  sundance.org
  5. Sundance Sets Dates for First Film Festival in Boulder  The Hollywood Reporter
